CustomField.description: True when this permit type is on the critical path — i.e., its absence or delay would block ROD/FONSI issuance. Populated into nepa_required_permit__c.nepa_is_critical_path__c at record creation. Critical-path permits feed nepa_blocked_permit_count__c rollup and the permit gap litigation risk penalty.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check if this permit type is typically critical-path (blocks ROD/FONSI if not issued).
CustomField.label: Is Critical Path
